prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为5246→5631→6137→4602→5221名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次大幅前移至4602名（近年最佳），2025年回落至5221名，近两年 波动幅度约600名，显示该校在福建物理类考生中的报考热度存在年度性起伏；2021–2025年物理类计划人数分别为96、98、100、96、97人，基本稳定在96–100 人区间。2026年计划93人，较2025年97人减少4人（缩招约4.1%），在考生总数持续增长的背景下，缩招将加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学是教育部直属的985工程、 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名稳定在第33–34名（2024年第33名，2025–2026年第34名），属于国内顶尖高校行列，综合实力强劲；2026年 声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室安全事故引发关注，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第23位（较热），整体曝光度中等偏上，未出现极端热度信号。历 史投档异常记录中未见重庆大学在福建有明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程获评A+（全国顶尖），机械工程、环境科学与工程、电气工程、风景园林 学获评A-，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类 均为高热推荐专业，与重庆大学优势工科高度匹配，有利于吸引高分考生。福建省2026年普通高考总人数约26.79万，较2025年约25.23万明显增加；按近年比例估算，物理类考生 约20.38万（较2025年19.21万增约6.1%），考生规模扩大将推高竞争烈度。；重庆大学位于重庆市，距福建较远，但作为西 南地区工科强校，对福建考生仍具一定吸引力。该校在福建招生规模适中（物理类约93–97人），属于省外985中招生较多的院校之一；电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等专业与当前社会高热专业方向高度契合。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5221 名、2026年缩招4.1%、福建省物理类考生增加约6.1%以及声誉偏负面等因素，竞争压力有所上升。，结合考生规模扩大和缩招带来的竞争加 剧效应，预测2026年物理类最低位次约5142名，区间4642–5642名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5246 → 5631 → 6137 → 4602 → 5221, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, the ranking significantly advanced to 4602 (best in recent years), and in 2025 it fell back to 5221. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 600 positions, indicating annual variations in the popularity of this university among Fujian Physics Category examinees. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 96, 98, 100, 96, and 97, basically stable in the 96–100 range. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 93, a decrease of 4 from 97 in 2025 (a reduction of about 4.1%). Against the backdrop of a continuously growing total number of examinees, the enrollment reduction will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. Its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking is stable at 33rd–34th (33rd in 2024, 34th in 2025–2026), placing it among the top domestic universities with strong comprehensive strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory safety incident that attracted attention, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some examinees' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with overall exposure at a medium-to-high level, without extreme popularity signals. Historical admission anomaly records show no obvious gap signal for Chongqing University in Fujian. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Civil Engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), and Mechanical Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Landscape Architecture were rated A-, highlighting its strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are all highly recommended popular majors, highly matching Chongqing University's advantageous engineering fields, which helps attract high-scoring examinees. The total number of Fujian general college entrance examination examinees in 2026 is about 267,900, a significant increase from about 252,300 in 2025. Estimated by recent proportions, Physics Category examinees are about 203,800 (an increase of about 6.1% from 192,100 in 2025), and the expansion of the examinee pool will raise competition intensity. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, which is relatively far from Fujian, but as a strong engineering university in the southwestern region, it still has a certain appeal to Fujian examinees. Its enrollment scale in Fujian is moderate (about 93–97 for Physics Category), making it one of the out-of-province 985 universities with relatively high enrollment. Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Science are highly aligned with current socially popular major directions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5221, a 4.1% enrollment reduction in 2026, an approximately 6.1% increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees, and a slightly negative reputation, competitive pressure has increased. Combining the effects of the expanded examinee pool and the intensified competition from enrollment reduction, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 5142, with a range of 4642–5642.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4642–5642, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Classes (Excellence Plan, High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing), use Tier 1 Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer and Intelligent Software as reach choices, and Tier 3 Smart Energy and Advanced Materials and Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental-Chemical Health as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4642), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为1106→1064→1158→1096→1086名，整体在1064–1158名之间窄幅波动，近5年波动幅度不足100名，位次极为稳定，2025年基准约1 086名；2021–2025年历史类计划人数分别为10、10、8、5、4人，呈逐年递减趋势。2026年计划大幅增至12人，较2025年4人增加8人（扩招200%），是近6 年最高水平，将显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜排名第34名，综合实力在西南地区工科院校中位居前列，对历史类考生同样具有较高吸引 力；2026年声誉偏负面（实验室安全事件），但主要涉及理工科实验室，对历史类考生报考心理影响有限；抖音热度较热，整体关注度中等；重庆大学以工科见长，历史类招生专业主要为人文科学试验班（法学新闻类）和汉语言文学（博雅类），虽非学校A类学科直接对应，但依托985平台，文科专业仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 重庆大学在福建历史类招生规模较小（近年4–12人），2026年大幅扩招至12 人，对福建历史类考生是重要利好信号；法学专业社会热度为分化观望（偏热但竞争激烈），汉语言文学/中文专业为推荐，文科基础学科热度平稳。福建省2026年历史类考生按比例估算约6.4万人（ 较2025年6.03万增约6.2%），考生规模扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1086名、2026年历史类计划从4人扩至12人（扩招200%）这一决定性因素，尽管考生总数略有增加 ，但扩招幅度远超考生增量，竞争显著缓解。，结合扩招带来的竞争缓解效应，预测2026年历史类最低位次约2339名，区间1988–2690名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1106 → 1064 → 1158 → 1096 → 1086, fluctuating narrowly between 1064 and 1158, with a fluctuation range of less than 100 positions over the past 5 years, indicating extremely stable rankings. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1086. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 10, 10, 8, 5, and 4 respectively, showing a decreasing trend year by year. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 12, an increase of 8 students compared to 2025 (a 200% expansion), the highest level in the past 6 years, which will significantly alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 34th in the Soft Science main ranking. Its comprehensive strength ranks among the top engineering universities in the Southwest region, and it also holds considerable appeal for History Category candidates. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative (due to a laboratory safety incident), but this mainly involves science and engineering labs, with limited impact on the application psychology of History Category candidates. Douyin popularity is relatively high, with overall attention at a moderate level. Chongqing University is known for its engineering strengths, and the History Category enrollment majors are mainly Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) and Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class). Although these are not directly aligned with the university's A-class disciplines, relying on the 985 platform, the humanities majors still have competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chongqing University's enrollment scale for History Category in Fujian is relatively small (4–12 students in recent years), with a significant expansion to 12 students in 2026, which is an important positive signal for Fujian History Category candidates. The social popularity of the law major is divided and cautious (relatively hot but competitive), while Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese major is recommended, with stable popularity for basic humanities disciplines. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province is approximately 64,000 (an increase of about 6.2% from 60,300 in 2025), indicating an expansion in the candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the decisive factor of the 2025 baseline ranking of 1086 and the expansion of the History Category plan from 4 to 12 students in 2026 (a 200% increase), although the total number of candidates has slightly increased, the expansion rate far exceeds the increase in candidates, significantly alleviating competition. Combined with the competition relief effect brought by the expansion, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 2339, with a range of 1988–2690.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1988–2690, it is recommended to primarily apply for Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) and Chinese Language and Literature (Boya Class), with foreign language majors (English, German, Japanese) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1988), focus on sprinting for the Law and Journalism class.
